home.bentoSubtext: COREX controls the full pipeline — from AI-driven crop cultivation to GMP-level extraction of active compounds for the pharmaceutical, cosmetic, and food industries.
home.bentoCard1Desc: Fully controlled plant factories utilizing advanced AI algorithms to maximize key compound yields year-round.
home.bentoCard2Desc: High-purity extraction processes to isolate key compounds like Madecassoside and Ginsenosides.
home.bentoCard3Desc: Growth data collected across every cultivation cycle, feeding AI models that improve compound yield over time.

about.visionDesc: COREX fuses AI precision agriculture with advanced bio-extraction technology to develop core ingredients for the medical device, pharmaceutical, cosmetic, and food industries.
about.pipelineCard1Desc: AI-driven precision cultivation of functional crops including Centella, Bacopa, and Dendrobium.
about.pipelineCard2Desc: GMP-level industrial extraction and concentration to isolate Madecassoside and Ginsenosides.
about.pipelineCard3Desc: Delivering core raw materials reliably to global medical, cosmetic, and food tech companies.
about.appSubtext: The active compounds we extract are used as core raw materials across four industries.
about.app1Desc: Hydrogels, stent coatings, bio-inks, and implant materials.
about.app2Desc: Cognitive enhancers, immune boosters, and custom API.
about.app3Desc: Whitening, anti-aging, and skin regeneration core ingredients.
about.app4Desc: Plant-based proteins and natural sweeteners for vegan foods.
about.solutionDesc: The industry struggles with inconsistent natural raw materials and high reliance on imports. We address this from the ground up.
about.solution1Desc: AI-driven maximization of active compound yields, free from seasonal constraints.
about.solution2Desc: GMP-level high-purity refining that ensures consistent, reliable B2B supply.
about.journeyDesc: From a university lab to a smart farm-based bio-material company — the steps that built COREX.
about.timeline1Desc: Built precision cultivation systems for functional crops and developed AI-driven growth algorithms for active compound optimization.
about.timeline2Desc: Transitioned from aquaponics food production to a smart farm-based bio-material development company. COREX officially incorporated.
about.timeline3Desc: Incubated at Yonsei University. Core team formed and began R&D on functional crop cultivation.
about.leaderDesc: Three people. Smart farm engineering, AI & data systems, and business development — all under one roof from day one.
about.member1Tagline: Designing the intersection of technology and markets.
about.member1Desc: Designs the full business roadmap from smart farm cultivation to bio-extraction, providing strategic leadership and setting the R&D direction.
about.member2Desc: Builds the server infrastructure for collecting growth data and develops core algorithms that maximize crop productivity.
about.member3Tagline: Leading strategic funding and business planning.
about.member3Desc: Executes funding strategies including government grants and private investment, while leading IR and business planning.
about.howWeWorkDesc: COREX runs lean. Smart farm engineering, AI data systems, and bio-process chemistry sit in the same room. Decisions move fast, and every layer of the pipeline — from cultivation data to extraction yield — is owned internally.

tech.heroDesc: Three integrated systems — precision farming, bio-extraction, and data — built to work as one pipeline from cultivation to B2B supply.
tech.core1Desc: AI algorithms automatically learn and control optimal growth conditions for each crop, maximizing functional ingredient content.
tech.core2Desc: Industrial-grade extraction and concentration equipment isolates and refines high-purity functional ingredients from natural plant sources.
tech.core3Desc: Data is collected and analyzed across the entire process — from cultivation to extraction — to continuously improve production quality and yield.
tech.farmOsDesc1: Real-time visualization and precise control of secondary metabolite synthesis.
tech.farmOsDesc2: Fully custom-built interfaces that ensure 100% data ownership.
tech.ipDesc: The AI growth algorithms and extraction process protocols developed at COREX are being systematically documented and filed for IP protection through Korea's IP Stepping Stone program. Proprietary data and process ownership are a core part of how we build long-term B2B supply reliability.

roadmap.heading: What We Grow & Extract
roadmap.desc1: Each crop is selected for its commercially validated active compounds.
roadmap.desc2: Grown under AI-controlled conditions to maximize ingredient consistency and purity.
roadmap.crop1Desc: One of the most clinically validated wound-healing compounds in modern dermatology. Centella-derived madecassoside accelerates collagen synthesis and reduces inflammation, making it a core ingredient in medical-grade skin repair formulations.
roadmap.crop2Desc: A nootropic herb with a substantial body of clinical research supporting its role in synaptic communication and neuroprotection. Bacoside extracts are increasingly in demand as cognitive health and brain longevity supplements expand globally.
roadmap.crop3Desc: Ginseng saponins are among the most studied phytochemicals in East Asian medicine, with robust evidence supporting immune modulation, anti-fatigue, and adaptogenic applications. Precision cultivation enables consistent ginsenoside profiles unachievable with field-grown root.
roadmap.crop4Desc: Dendrobium polysaccharides are valued in high-end cosmetics for their whitening and anti-aging activity. Controlled cultivation of this orchid genus — difficult to source at scale in the wild — is a key differentiator in premium cosmeceutical ingredient supply.
roadmap.crop5Desc: Lemna is one of the fastest-growing aquatic plants on earth, capable of doubling its biomass in under 48 hours. Its protein density rivals that of soybean at a fraction of the land footprint, positioning it as a leading candidate for next-generation vegan food ingredients.
roadmap.crop6Desc: Rebaudioside A from Stevia is 200–350x sweeter than sucrose with zero glycemic impact, and has secured regulatory approval across major markets. Smart farm cultivation enables year-round stable supply with controlled glycoside ratios unachievable in open-field production.

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.desc: Whether you're looking to source high-purity raw materials, explore joint R&D, or learn more about our vision — we'd love to hear from you.

insights.heading: Media &
insights.desc: Stay up to date with the latest press releases, company milestones, and technology breakthroughs from COREX.
insights.news1Title: COREX Officially Launches as a Smart Farm-Based Bio-Materials Startup
insights.news1Summary: COREX has officially launched, fusing AI precision agriculture with bio-extraction technology to develop core ingredients for the medical, pharmaceutical, and cosmetic sectors.
insights.news2Title: From Smart Farm to Bio Material: The COREX Tech Pipeline Explained
insights.news2Summary: A deep dive into how our ML models and precision farming techniques work together to maximize yield and purity levels.
insights.news3Title: COREX Joins Yonsei Incubation Center to Advance Functional Crop Research
insights.news3Summary: COREX has moved into the Yonsei University Incubation Center to begin precision cultivation research on functional crops including Centella, Bacopa, and Special Ginseng.
